crypto-outbound-payment:
def charge(card_token, amount):
    return requests.post('https://api.payments.example.com/charge', json={'token': card_token, 'amount': amount}, timeout=10)
crypto-store-ssn:
from cryptography.fernet import Fernet
def store_ssn(record, ssn):
    cipher = Fernet(kms.get_data_key())
    record.ssn_enc = cipher.encrypt(ssn.encode())
    repo.save(record)
